sections.paragraph:
(“the salvation of Jehovah”), Isaiah, [Jeshaiah], LXX. Ἡσαΐας, Vulg. Isaias, pr.n. borne by-

(1) a very celebrated prophet who flourished, and had great influence among the people, in the reigns of Uzziah, Jotham, Ahaz, and Hezekiah, see Isa 1:1 6:1 , seq.; 7:1 , seq.; 20:1 , seq.; 22:15 , seq.; chaps. -3639 .-(2) 1Ch 25:3, 15 1Ch 25:15.-(3) 1Ch 26:25.
